title: Notification No.113/2004-Cus(NT), dated 21.10.2004
text: 21st October, 2004 Notification No.113/2004-Customs(N.T.) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962) and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Finance(Department of Revenue) No.27/92-Customs (N.T.), dated the 27th March, 1992, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide No. G.S.R. 369(E), dated the 27th March, 1992, the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the officers specified in column (2) of the Table below as officer of customs of the rank specified in the corresponding entry in column (3) of the said Table, namely :- Table Sl.No.(1) Officers (2) Rank of officer of customs (3) 1. Director General (Vigilance) 1. Chief Commissioner 2. Additional Director General (Vigilance) 2. Commissioner 3. Additional Commissioner (Vigilance) 3. Additional Commissioner 4. Joint Commissioner (Vigilance) 4. Joint Commissioner 5. Deputy Commissioner (Vigilance) 5. Deputy Commissioner 6. Assistant Commissioner (Vigilance) 6. Assistant Commissioner. F.NO.437/39/2004-CUS.IV D.S.Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
